title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I only want to hear feminine voices!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He'd never do something like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: with this, we can confirm his betrayal....!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: So he's in the S.A.D. Production Room...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If it were me, well... first

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
